items.content_html: Inspired by the gitmoji CLI tool, this plugin offers a smooth and responsive emoji prompt, presenting a curated list of emojis for meaningful commit messages. Improve your commit message writing experience with this simple and easy-to-use plugin in Neovim. Happy committing with emojis! 🎉😄🚀
items.title: zakissimo/smoji.nvim: Inspired by the gitmoji CLI tool, this plugin offers a smooth and responsive emoji prompt, presenting a curated list of emojis for meaningful commit messages. Improve your commit message writing experience with this simple and easy-to-use plugin in Neovim. Happy committing with emojis! 🎉😄🚀

items.content_html: Initially intended to be a markdown live preview, live.nvim is a powerful Neovim plugin that creates a real-time bridge between your editor and the web. It streams your buffer content to a web server, enabling live previews and collaborative editing.

items.content_html: This Neovim configuration enhances productivity with robust plugin management, seamless LSP integration for intelligent code completion, and improved syntax highlighting. It offers streamlined workflows and high customizability, providing a modern and efficient development environment tailored to various coding needs.
